articles.title: We had a team of agents rebuild SQLite from its 835-page manual. It created a replica in Rust which passed 100% of a held-out test suite. Interestingly, cost varied 15x depending on which model mix we
articles.description:
We had a team of agents rebuild SQLite from its 835-page manual.

It created a replica in Rust which passed 100% of a held-out test suite.

Interestingly, cost varied 15x depending on which model mix we used.
